chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-422 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on withdrawal statement as flagged. 3. For hearing of main case. ------ 28.08.2025 None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh assisted by Zain-ul-Abideen Abbasi, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. ------ Through this petition, the petitioner seeks his release on post- arrest bail in Crime No.04/2024, registered at Excise Police Station, Shikarpur under section 9(c) of the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 2024. Since the amendments have been made by the Provincial Assembly of Sindh in the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 2024 (Sindh Act No.VIII of 2024) through the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025, however, the same is yet to receive the assent of the Governor and to be published in the official Gazette, the petitioners have remedy to approach the appropriate forum/Special Court or competent Court for bail. The guidelines in this regard are provided by this Court in C.P.No.D-625 of 2025 (Re. Hafeezullah Lashari v. Province of Sindh and others) and in C.P.No.D-725 of 2025 (Re. Peer Bux v. The State and others) at Circuit Court, Hyderabad. Learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh as well as Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh raised no objection for above proposal. In view of above, instant petition is disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the appropriate forum / Special Court or competent Court for bail after issuance of proper notification through official Gazette.

Learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh as well as Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh raised no objection for above proposal. In view of above, instant petition is disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the appropriate forum / Special Court or competent Court for bail after issuance of proper notification through official Gazette. Judge Judge Manzoor
